mapper.select: SELECT E_MATERIAL_CODE.ID, E_MATERIAL_CODE.CATEGORY_ID, E_MATERIAL_CODE.MATERIAL_CODE, E_MATERIAL_CODE.MATERIAL_NAME, E_MATERIAL_CODE.PURCHASE_TYPE_CODE, E_MATERIAL_CODE.PURCHASE_TYPE_NAME, E_MATERIAL_CODE.SPECIFICATION_MODEL, E_MATERIAL_CODE.BRAND, E_MATERIAL_CODE.UNIT_CODE, E_MATERIAL_CODE.UNIT_NAME, E_MATERIAL_CODE.MNEMONIC_CODE, E_MATERIAL_CODE.STATUS, E_MATERIAL_CODE.CREATE_BY, E_MATERIAL_CODE.CREATE_BY_NAME, E_MATERIAL_CODE.CREATE_TIME, E_MATERIAL_CODE.UPDATE_BY, E_MATERIAL_CODE.UPDATE_BY_NAME, E_MATERIAL_CODE.UPDATE_TIME, E_MATERIAL_CODE.DEL_FLAG, E_MATERIAL_CODE.DELETE_BY, E_MATERIAL_CODE.DELETE_BY_NAME, E_MATERIAL_CODE.DELETE_TIME, c.CATEGORY_NAME, CASE WHEN c3.CATEGORY_NAME IS NOT NULL AND c2.CATEGORY_NAME IS NOT NULL AND c.CATEGORY_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN c3.CATEGORY_NAME || '/' || c2.CATEGORY_NAME || '/' || c.CATEGORY_NAME WHEN c2.CATEGORY_NAME IS NOT NULL AND c.CATEGORY_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN c2.CATEGORY_NAME || '/' || c.CATEGORY_NAME WHEN c.CATEGORY_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN c.CATEGORY_NAME ELSE '' END AS CATEGORY_PATH FROM E_MATERIAL_CODE LEFT JOIN E_MATERIAL_CATEGORY c ON E_MATERIAL_CODE.CATEGORY_ID = c.ID AND c.DEL_FLAG = 0 LEFT JOIN E_MATERIAL_CATEGORY c2 ON c.PARENT_ID = c2.ID AND c2.DEL_FLAG = 0 LEFT JOIN E_MATERIAL_CATEGORY c3 ON c2.PARENT_ID = c3.ID AND c3.DEL_FLAG = 0 WHERE E_MATERIAL_CODE.ID = #{id} AND E_MATERIAL_CODE.DEL_FLAG = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_MATERIAL_CODE ( ID, CATEGORY_ID, MATERIAL_CODE, MATERIAL_NAME, PURCHASE_TYPE_CODE, PURCHASE_TYPE_NAME, SPECIFICATION_MODEL, BRAND, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, MNEMONIC_CODE, STATUS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, DEL_FLAG ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{categoryId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{materialCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{materialName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{purchaseTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{purchaseTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{specificationModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{brand,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unitCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unitName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mnemonicCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE E_MATERIAL_CODE
CATEGORY_ID = #{categoryId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
MATERIAL_CODE = #{materialCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MATERIAL_NAME = #{materialName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PURCHASE_TYPE_CODE = #{purchaseTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PURCHASE_TYPE_NAME = #{purchaseTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SPECIFICATION_MODEL = #{specificationModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BRAND = #{brand,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UNIT_CODE = #{unitCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UNIT_NAME = #{unitName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MNEMONIC_CODE = #{mnemonicCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
WHERE ID = #{id}

UPDATE E_MATERIAL_CODE SET DEL_FLAG = 1, DELETE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, DELETE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DELETE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT e.ID, e.CATEGORY_ID, e.MATERIAL_CODE, e.MATERIAL_NAME, e.PURCHASE_TYPE_CODE, e.PURCHASE_TYPE_NAME, e.SPECIFICATION_MODEL, e.BRAND, e.UNIT_CODE, e.UNIT_NAME, e.MNEMONIC_CODE, e.STATUS, c.CATEGORY_NAME, CASE WHEN c3.CATEGORY_NAME IS NOT NULL AND c2.CATEGORY_NAME IS NOT NULL AND c.CATEGORY_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN c3.CATEGORY_NAME || '/' || c2.CATEGORY_NAME || '/' || c.CATEGORY_NAME WHEN c2.CATEGORY_NAME IS NOT NULL AND c.CATEGORY_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN c2.CATEGORY_NAME || '/' || c.CATEGORY_NAME WHEN c.CATEGORY_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN c.CATEGORY_NAME ELSE '' END AS CATEGORY_PATH FROM E_MATERIAL_CODE e LEFT JOIN E_MATERIAL_CATEGORY c ON e.CATEGORY_ID = c.ID AND c.DEL_FLAG = 0 LEFT JOIN E_MATERIAL_CATEGORY c2 ON c.PARENT_ID = c2.ID AND c2.DEL_FLAG = 0 LEFT JOIN E_MATERIAL_CATEGORY c3 ON c2.PARENT_ID = c3.ID AND c3.DEL_FLAG = 0 WHERE e.DEL_FLAG = 0 AND e.STATUS = '0' ORDER BY c.ID, e.MATERIAL_NAME

SELECT c.ID, c.PARENT_ID, c.CATEGORY_CODE, c.CATEGORY_NAME, c.SORT_ORDER, c.IS_LABOR_PROTECTION, c.CATEGORY_LEVEL, c2.CATEGORY_NAME AS PARENT_NAME, CASE WHEN c3.CATEGORY_NAME IS NOT NULL AND c2.CATEGORY_NAME IS NOT NULL AND c.CATEGORY_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN c3.CATEGORY_NAME || '/' || c2.CATEGORY_NAME || '/' || c.CATEGORY_NAME WHEN c2.CATEGORY_NAME IS NOT NULL AND c.CATEGORY_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN c2.CATEGORY_NAME || '/' || c.CATEGORY_NAME WHEN c.CATEGORY_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN c.CATEGORY_NAME ELSE '' END AS CATEGORY_PATH FROM E_MATERIAL_CATEGORY c LEFT JOIN E_MATERIAL_CATEGORY c2 ON c.PARENT_ID = c2.ID AND c2.DEL_FLAG = 0 LEFT JOIN E_MATERIAL_CATEGORY c3 ON c2.PARENT_ID = c3.ID AND c3.DEL_FLAG = 0 WHERE c.DEL_FLAG = 0 AND c.CATEGORY_LEVEL = 3 ORDER BY c.SORT_ORDER, c.CATEGORY_NAME
